infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Luna uses your camera to let you share photos from venues with your crew and scan QR codes at the door.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Luna accesses your photo library so you can share memories from Luna Group venues.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Luna saves shared event photos to your library when you tap save.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Luna uses your location to show nearby venues, auto-check you in when you arrive, and unlock location-based rewards.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Luna uses your location in the background to automatically check you in when you arrive at a Luna venue and deliver event boosts while you're on the dance floor.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Luna uses your location in the background to automatically check you in when you arrive at a Luna venue.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Luna uses your contacts so you can invite friends to join you at Luna Group venues.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Luna uses Face ID to securely unlock your wallet passes and confirm high-value transactions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Luna may use the microphone when recording short venue video clips to share with your crew.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Luna uses this permission to personalise event recommendations and measure which events you enjoy most. We do not share your data with third-party advertisers.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Luna adds booked events to your calendar so you never miss a night out.
